title: poset_phase: Action-Weighted Poset Ensemble Analysis — Code, Data, and Figures
description: Exact numerical framework for studying geometric phase transitions in finite partially ordered sets (posets). Includes the complete codebase for computing exact linear extension counts, action-weighted ensemble comparisons, ablation experiments, and non-circular replacement analysis. Accompanies the manuscript: 'Bounded Geometric Phase Transition in Finite Causal Posets with Exact Entropy'.
notes: This software accompanies a manuscript currently under preparation. AI tools (Claude, Anthropic) assisted with code development and analysis.
